d6a7ccdb-5930-4374-b73a-c30bdf597767.title: Welcome to Home Suite Home
d6a7ccdb-5930-4374-b73a-c30bdf597767.markdown:
# Welcome to Home Suite Home

This homelab workspace is seeded with:

- live Markdown notes
- draw.io-compatible diagram storage
- voice memo ingestion and transcript jobs
- chat rooms and call signaling
- durable JSON state snapshots across restarts

Edit this note and save it from the browser.

blocks.text: This homelab workspace is seeded with:

- draw.io-compatible diagram storage
- voice memo ingestion and transcript jobs
